analyst/cross_sectional.title: Do Brokerage Analysts' Recommendations Have Investment Value?
analyst/cross_sectional.key_finding_en: Buy (sell) recommendations predict positive (negative) abnormal returns; initial reaction incomplete with post-event drift.
analyst/cross_sectional.key_finding_zh: 買入（賣出）推薦預測正向（負向）超額報酬；初期反應不完全，存在事件後漂移。

analyst/cross_sectional.title: Common Stock Returns Surrounding Earnings Forecast Revisions: Puzzling Evidence
analyst/cross_sectional.key_finding_en: Earnings forecast revisions by analysts predict stock returns; the market underreacts to revision information.
analyst/cross_sectional.key_finding_zh: 分析師盈餘預測修正預測股票報酬；市場對修正信息反應不足。

analyst/cross_sectional.authors: Barber, B., Lehavy, R., McNichols, M., Trueman, B.
analyst/cross_sectional.title: Can Investors Profit from the Prophets?
analyst/cross_sectional.key_finding_en: Consensus analyst recommendations predict cross-sectional returns; the most highly recommended stocks outperform.
analyst/cross_sectional.key_finding_zh: 分析師共識推薦預測橫截面報酬；最受推薦的股票表現優異。

analyst/time_series.authors: Jegadeesh, N., Kim, J., Krische, S.D., Lee, C.M.C.
analyst/time_series.title: Analyzing the Analysts: When Do Recommendations Add Value?
analyst/time_series.key_finding_en: Changes in analyst consensus (revisions) predict returns better than levels; time-series of recommendation changes capture evolving fundamentals.
analyst/time_series.key_finding_zh: 分析師共識的變化（修正）比靜態水平更好地預測報酬；推薦變化的時間序列捕捉基本面的演變。

analyst/time_series.title: Analysts, Industries, and Price Momentum
analyst/time_series.journal: Journal of Financial and Quantitative Analysis
analyst/time_series.key_finding_en: Analyst recommendation changes within industries predict momentum; industry-adjusted analyst signals earn significant returns.
analyst/time_series.key_finding_zh: 行業內分析師推薦變化預測動量；行業調整後的分析師信號產生顯著報酬。

analyst/time_series.title: Analyst Forecast Revisions and Market Price Discovery
analyst/time_series.key_finding_en: The speed of price discovery varies with analyst forecast revision activity; revisions accelerate information incorporation.
analyst/time_series.key_finding_zh: 價格發現速度隨分析師預測修正活動而變化；修正加速信息融入價格。

analyst/group.title: Analysts, Industries, and Price Momentum
analyst/group.journal: Journal of Financial and Quantitative Analysis
analyst/group.key_finding_en: Industry-sorted analyst signals have stronger predictive power; group-level analysis captures analyst industry specialization.
analyst/group.key_finding_zh: 行業排序的分析師信號具有更強的預測能力；組級分析捕捉分析師的行業專業性。

analyst/group.authors: Barber, B., Lehavy, R., Trueman, B.
analyst/group.title: Comparing the Stock Recommendation Performance of Investment Banks and Independent Research Firms
analyst/group.key_finding_en: Analyst recommendation profitability varies by firm type; conflicts of interest affect recommendation quality.
analyst/group.key_finding_zh: 分析師推薦的獲利能力因公司類型而異；利益衝突影響推薦質量。

fundamental/cross_sectional.title: The Cross-Section of Expected Stock Returns
fundamental/cross_sectional.key_finding_en: Size and book-to-market equity capture cross-sectional variation in average stock returns associated with beta, leverage, and E/P ratios.
fundamental/cross_sectional.key_finding_zh: 規模和帳面市值比捕捉了平均股票報酬的橫截面變化，這些變化與beta、槓桿和盈餘價格比相關。

fundamental/cross_sectional.title: Value Investing: The Use of Historical Financial Statement Information to Separate Winners from Losers
fundamental/cross_sectional.key_finding_en: A composite F_SCORE based on financial signals (profitability, leverage, operating efficiency) identifies value stocks with superior returns.
fundamental/cross_sectional.key_finding_zh: 基於財務信號的F_SCORE綜合指標（獲利能力、槓桿、運營效率）識別具有優異報酬的價值股。

fundamental/cross_sectional.title: Dissecting Anomalies
fundamental/cross_sectional.key_finding_en: Many anomalies (net stock issues, accruals, momentum) are concentrated in microcaps; size sorting explains much of the cross-section.
fundamental/cross_sectional.key_finding_zh: 許多異常現象集中在微型股中；規模排序解釋了大部分橫截面差異。

fundamental/time_series.title: Do Stock Prices Fully Reflect Information in Accruals and Cash Flows About Future Earnings?
fundamental/time_series.key_finding_en: Firms with high (low) accruals experience negative (positive) future returns; the accrual anomaly reflects time-series earnings persistence.
fundamental/time_series.key_finding_zh: 高（低）應計項目的公司經歷負（正）未來報酬；應計項目異常反映了盈餘持續性的時間序列差異。

fundamental/time_series.title: Economic Links and Predictable Returns
fundamental/time_series.key_finding_en: Time-series of customer-supplier relationships predict cross-firm return predictability; fundamental links generate lead-lag effects.
fundamental/time_series.key_finding_zh: 客戶-供應商關係的時間序列預測跨公司報酬的可預測性；基本面關聯產生領先-滯後效應。

fundamental/group.title: The Other Side of Value: The Gross Profitability Premium
fundamental/group.key_finding_en: Gross profitability (revenue minus COGS) predicts returns independent of book-to-market; profitable firms earn premium within industries.
fundamental/group.key_finding_zh: 總獲利能力（收入減去銷售成本）獨立於帳面市值比預測報酬；行業內獲利能力強的公司獲得溢價。

fundamental/group.title: A Five-Factor Asset Pricing Model
fundamental/group.key_finding_en: Profitability (RMW) and investment (CMA) factors capture the cross-section of returns within industry groups.
fundamental/group.key_finding_zh: 獲利能力和投資因子描述了行業組內的橫截面報酬。

model/cross_sectional.authors: Gu, S., Kelly, B., Xiu, D.
model/cross_sectional.title: Empirical Asset Pricing via Machine Learning
model/cross_sectional.key_finding_en: ML methods (neural networks, trees) substantially improve cross-sectional return predictions; dominant signals include momentum, liquidity, and volatility.
model/cross_sectional.key_finding_zh: 機器學習方法顯著改善橫截面報酬預測；主導信號包括動量、流動性和波動率。

model/cross_sectional.authors: Kozak, S., Nagel, S., Santosh, S.
model/cross_sectional.title: Shrinking the Cross-Section
model/cross_sectional.key_finding_en: Bayesian shrinkage of characteristic-based factors reveals that a few principal components capture the cross-section of returns.
model/cross_sectional.key_finding_zh: 基於特徵因子的貝葉斯壓縮揭示少數主成分即可捕捉報酬的橫截面。

model/cross_sectional.title: The Cross-Section of Expected Stock Returns
model/cross_sectional.key_finding_en: A comprehensive review of cross-sectional predictability; most anomalies are highly correlated and explained by a few factors.
model/cross_sectional.key_finding_zh: 橫截面可預測性的綜合回顧；大多數異常高度相關，可由少數因子解釋。

model/time_series.authors: Moskowitz, T.J., Ooi, Y.H., Pedersen, L.H.
model/time_series.title: Time Series Momentum
model/time_series.key_finding_en: Persistence in returns for 1-12 months across 58 futures instruments; time-series momentum generates substantial abnormal returns.
model/time_series.key_finding_zh: 58個期貨工具的1-12個月報酬持續性；時間序列動量產生顯著的超額報酬。

model/time_series.title: Does the Stock Market Overreact?
model/time_series.key_finding_en: Extreme past losers (winners) become future winners (losers) over 3-5 year horizons; time-series reversal reflects overreaction.
model/time_series.key_finding_zh: 過去極端輸家（贏家）在3-5年後成為未來贏家（輸家）；時間序列反轉反映過度反應。

model/group.title: The Cross-Section of Expected Stock Returns
model/group.key_finding_en: Cross-sectional predictability is concentrated when factors are formed within industry and size groups; group formation matters.
model/group.key_finding_zh: 橫截面可預測性在行業和規模組內形成因子時最為集中；組的形成方式至關重要。

model/group.title: Size, Value, and Momentum in International Stock Returns
model/group.key_finding_en: Value and momentum premiums exist across global markets; industry-adjusted factors show consistent patterns across countries.
model/group.key_finding_zh: 價值和動量溢價存在於全球市場；行業調整因子在各國表現一致。

news/cross_sectional.title: Giving Content to Investor Sentiment: The Role of Media in the Stock Market
news/cross_sectional.key_finding_en: High media pessimism predicts downward price pressure followed by reversion; cross-sectional media tone predicts returns.
news/cross_sectional.key_finding_zh: 高媒體悲觀情緒預測價格下行壓力後隨反轉；橫截面媒體語氣預測報酬。

news/cross_sectional.authors: Da, Z., Engelberg, J., Gao, P.
news/cross_sectional.title: In Search of Attention
news/cross_sectional.key_finding_en: Google search volume (SVI) proxies for investor attention; abnormal SVI predicts short-term return reversals in the cross-section.
news/cross_sectional.key_finding_zh: 谷歌搜索量代理投資者關注度；異常搜索量預測橫截面短期報酬反轉。

news/cross_sectional.authors: Tetlock, P.C., Saar-Tsechansky, M., Macskassy, S.
news/cross_sectional.title: More Than Words: Quantifying Language to Measure Firms' Fundamentals
news/cross_sectional.key_finding_en: Negative word counts in firm-specific news predict lower earnings; linguistic analysis provides cross-sectional fundamental signals.
news/cross_sectional.key_finding_zh: 公司特定新聞中的負面詞彙計數預測較低盈餘；語言分析提供橫截面基本面信號。

news/time_series.title: Information Uncertainty and Stock Returns
news/time_series.key_finding_en: Information uncertainty amplifies return anomalies; time-series variation in uncertainty predicts reversals.
news/time_series.key_finding_zh: 信息不確定性放大報酬異常；不確定性的時間序列變化預測反轉。

news/time_series.authors: Tetlock, P.C., Saar-Tsechansky, M., Macskassy, S.
news/time_series.title: More Than Words: Quantifying Language to Measure Firms' Fundamentals
news/time_series.key_finding_en: Time-series changes in negative language predict earnings and returns; linguistic tone shifts convey fundamental information.
news/time_series.key_finding_zh: 負面語言的時間序列變化預測盈餘和報酬；語言語氣轉變傳達基本面信息。

news/group.title: Media Coverage and the Cross-Section of Stock Returns
news/group.key_finding_en: Stocks with low media coverage earn higher returns; industry-adjusted media coverage identifies information asymmetry effects.
news/group.key_finding_zh: 媒體報導少的股票報酬更高；行業調整的媒體覆蓋識別信息不對稱效應。

news/group.title: Giving Content to Investor Sentiment: The Role of Media in the Stock Market
news/group.key_finding_en: Industry-level media pessimism predicts trading volume and returns; group sentiment has predictive power beyond firm-level.
news/group.key_finding_zh: 行業級媒體悲觀情緒預測成交量和報酬；組情緒的預測能力超越公司層面。

option/cross_sectional.title: Does Net Buying Pressure Affect the Shape of Implied Volatility Functions?
option/cross_sectional.key_finding_en: Net buying pressure in options markets shapes implied volatility smiles; cross-sectional option demand predicts future volatility.
option/cross_sectional.key_finding_zh: 選擇權市場的淨買入壓力塑造隱含波動率微笑曲線；橫截面選擇權需求預測未來波動率。

option/cross_sectional.title: Deviations from Put-Call Parity and Stock Return Predictability
option/cross_sectional.journal: Journal of Financial and Quantitative Analysis
option/cross_sectional.key_finding_en: Deviations from put-call parity predict future stock returns; cross-sectional implied volatility spreads contain predictive power.
option/cross_sectional.key_finding_zh: 看跌-看漲平價偏離預測未來股票報酬；橫截面隱含波動率價差具有預測能力。

option/cross_sectional.authors: An, B.J., Ang, A., Bali, T.G., Cakici, N.
option/cross_sectional.title: The Joint Cross Section of Options and Stock Returns
option/cross_sectional.key_finding_en: Options-implied volatility and stock characteristics jointly predict returns; cross-sectional option moments contain incremental information.
option/cross_sectional.key_finding_zh: 選擇權隱含波動率和股票特徵共同預測報酬；橫截面選擇權矩包含增量信息。

option/time_series.title: Does Net Buying Pressure Affect the Shape of Implied Volatility Functions?
option/time_series.key_finding_en: Time-series variation in options net buying pressure predicts changes in implied volatility surfaces.
option/time_series.key_finding_zh: 選擇權淨買入壓力的時間序列變化預測隱含波動率曲面的變化。

option/time_series.title: Deviations from Put-Call Parity and Stock Return Predictability
option/time_series.journal: Journal of Financial and Quantitative Analysis
option/time_series.key_finding_en: Time-series of put-call parity deviations predict return reversals; changes in options market efficiency signal return predictability.
option/time_series.key_finding_zh: 看跌-看漲平價偏離的時間序列預測報酬反轉；選擇權市場效率的變化預示報酬可預測性。

option/group.authors: An, B.J., Ang, A., Bali, T.G., Cakici, N.
option/group.title: The Joint Cross Section of Options and Stock Returns
option/group.key_finding_en: Industry-adjusted options-implied skewness and volatility predict cross-sectional returns; group adjustment removes common volatility factors.
option/group.key_finding_zh: 行業調整的選擇權隱含偏度和波動率預測橫截面報酬；組調整去除共同波動因子。

option/group.authors: Roll, R., Schwartz, E., Subrahmanyam, A.
option/group.title: O/S: The Relative Trading Activity in Options and Stock
option/group.key_finding_en: Options-to-stock trading volume ratio (O/S) contains information about informed trading within industry groups.
option/group.key_finding_zh: 選擇權與股票交易量比率包含行業組內知情交易的信息。

price_volume/cross_sectional.title: Returns to Buying Winners and Selling Losers: Implications for Stock Market Efficiency
price_volume/cross_sectional.key_finding_en: Strategies buying past winners and selling past losers generate significant 3-12 month returns; cross-sectional momentum is not explained by risk.
price_volume/cross_sectional.key_finding_zh: 買入過去贏家、賣出過去輸家的策略產生顯著的3-12個月報酬；橫截面動量無法由風險解釋。

price_volume/cross_sectional.title: The Cross-Section of Expected Stock Returns
price_volume/cross_sectional.key_finding_en: Cross-sectional ranking on size and book-to-market captures most of the variation in expected returns.
price_volume/cross_sectional.key_finding_zh: 按規模和帳面市值比的橫截面排名捕捉了預期報酬的大部分變化。

price_volume/cross_sectional.title: Do Industries Explain Momentum?
price_volume/cross_sectional.key_finding_en: Industry momentum accounts for much of individual stock momentum; cross-sectional industry ranking generates momentum profits.
price_volume/cross_sectional.key_finding_zh: 行業動量解釋了個股動量的大部分；橫截面行業排名產生動量利潤。

price_volume/time_series.authors: Moskowitz, T.J., Ooi, Y.H., Pedersen, L.H.
price_volume/time_series.title: Time Series Momentum
price_volume/time_series.key_finding_en: Time-series momentum exists across asset classes; past 12-month return predicts continuation for 1-12 months then reversal.
price_volume/time_series.key_finding_zh: 時間序列動量存在於各資產類別；過去12個月報酬預測1-12個月持續性後反轉。

price_volume/time_series.authors: Stambaugh, R.F., Yu, J., Yuan, Y.
price_volume/time_series.title: The Short of It: Investor Sentiment and Anomalies
price_volume/time_series.key_finding_en: Sentiment interacts with time-series return anomalies; short-leg profitability increases after high sentiment periods.
price_volume/time_series.key_finding_zh: 情緒與時間序列報酬異常相互作用；高情緒期後空頭端獲利能力增加。

price_volume/group.title: Do Industries Explain Momentum?
price_volume/group.key_finding_en: Industry grouping explains most momentum profits; within-industry momentum strategies outperform cross-industry strategies.
price_volume/group.key_finding_zh: 行業分組解釋了大部分動量利潤；行業內動量策略優於跨行業策略。

price_volume/group.title: The Cross-Section of Expected Stock Returns
price_volume/group.key_finding_en: Group-based factor formation (size, industry, book-to-market) is critical for capturing return predictability.
price_volume/group.key_finding_zh: 基於組的因子形成（規模、行業、帳面市值比）對於捕捉報酬可預測性至關重要。

sentiment/cross_sectional.title: Giving Content to Investor Sentiment: The Role of Media in the Stock Market
sentiment/cross_sectional.key_finding_en: Quantitative media pessimism predicts cross-sectional returns; sentiment proxies predict price pressure and reversion.
sentiment/cross_sectional.key_finding_zh: 量化媒體悲觀情緒預測橫截面報酬；情緒代理指標預測價格壓力和反轉。

sentiment/cross_sectional.title: Investor Sentiment and the Cross-Section of Stock Returns
sentiment/cross_sectional.key_finding_en: Sentiment index predicts cross-sectional returns; stocks with high sentiment sensitivity earn lower future returns.
sentiment/cross_sectional.key_finding_zh: 情緒指數預測橫截面報酬；高情緒敏感性的股票未來報酬較低。

sentiment/cross_sectional.authors: Stambaugh, R.F., Yu, J., Yuan, Y.
sentiment/cross_sectional.title: The Short of It: Investor Sentiment and Anomalies
sentiment/cross_sectional.key_finding_en: Sentiment amplifies anomaly returns cross-sectionally; overpricing is more prevalent when sentiment is high.
sentiment/cross_sectional.key_finding_zh: 情緒橫截面放大異常報酬；情緒高時過度定價更普遍。

sentiment/time_series.authors: Da, Z., Engelberg, J., Gao, P.
sentiment/time_series.title: In Search of Attention
sentiment/time_series.key_finding_en: Time-series of FEARS index predicts return reversals; spikes in sentiment-driven attention predict short-term price corrections.
sentiment/time_series.key_finding_zh: FEARS指數的時間序列預測報酬反轉；情緒驅動關注度的飆升預測短期價格修正。

sentiment/time_series.title: Investor Sentiment in the Stock Market
sentiment/time_series.key_finding_en: Time-series sentiment measures predict aggregate market returns; sentiment waves correlate with return patterns.
sentiment/time_series.key_finding_zh: 時間序列情緒指標預測整體市場報酬；情緒波動與報酬模式相關。

sentiment/group.title: Investor Sentiment and the Cross-Section of Stock Returns
sentiment/group.key_finding_en: Sentiment effects vary across industries; group-relative sentiment adjustment isolates firm-specific mispricing.
sentiment/group.key_finding_zh: 情緒效應因行業而異；組相對情緒調整分離出公司特定的錯誤定價。

sentiment/group.authors: Stambaugh, R.F., Yu, J., Yuan, Y.
sentiment/group.title: The Short of It: Investor Sentiment and Anomalies
sentiment/group.key_finding_en: Sentiment-conditioned anomaly profits are stronger for stocks with high-idiosyncratic-risk within industry groups.
sentiment/group.key_finding_zh: 情緒條件下的異常報酬在行業組內高特質風險的股票中更強。

social_media/cross_sectional.authors: Da, Z., Engelberg, J., Gao, P.
social_media/cross_sectional.title: In Search of Attention
social_media/cross_sectional.key_finding_en: Internet search volume cross-sectionally predicts attention-driven trading; abnormal SVI correlates with retail trading activity.
social_media/cross_sectional.key_finding_zh: 網絡搜索量橫截面預測關注度驅動的交易；異常搜索量與散戶交易活動相關。

social_media/cross_sectional.title: All That Glitters: The Effect of Attention and News on the Buying Behavior of Individual and Institutional Investors
social_media/cross_sectional.key_finding_en: Attention-driven buying behavior predicts cross-sectional returns; individual investors are net buyers of attention-grabbing stocks.
social_media/cross_sectional.key_finding_zh: 關注度驅動的買入行為預測橫截面報酬；散戶是吸引注意力股票的淨買入者。

social_media/time_series.authors: Da, Z., Engelberg, J., Gao, P.
social_media/time_series.title: In Search of Attention
social_media/time_series.key_finding_en: Time-series of search volume predicts return patterns; spikes in retail attention predict temporary price pressure.
social_media/time_series.key_finding_zh: 搜索量的時間序列預測報酬模式；散戶關注度的飆升預測暫時的價格壓力。

social_media/time_series.title: All That Glitters
social_media/time_series.key_finding_en: Time variation in attention-driven buying predicts return reversals; attention spikes are followed by negative returns.
social_media/time_series.key_finding_zh: 關注度驅動買入的時間變化預測報酬反轉；關注度飆升後跟隨負報酬。

social_media/group.title: All That Glitters
social_media/group.key_finding_en: Attention effects vary by industry and size groups; group-relative attention signals identify stocks most affected by retail trading.
social_media/group.key_finding_zh: 關注度效應因行業和規模組而異；組相對關注度信號識別受散戶交易影響最大的股票。

social_media/group.title: Is All That Talk Just Noise? The Information Content of Internet Stock Message Boards
social_media/group.key_finding_en: Internet stock message board activity predicts return volatility within industry groups; group-relative message volume signals future trading activity.
social_media/group.key_finding_zh: 互聯網股票留言板活動預測行業組內的報酬波動；組相對留言量預示未來交易活動。
